fields.name: api_key
fields.title: API Key
fields.description: Your Stripe API Key (starts with sk_test_ or sk_live_)

replication_config.title: Replication Configuration
replication_config.description: Settings for data replication from Stripe.

fields.name: account_id
fields.title: Account ID
fields.description: Your Stripe account ID (starts with 'acct_', find yours at https://dashboard.stripe.com/settings/account)

custom_description:
Stripe is a payment processing platform that enables businesses to accept payments,
manage subscriptions, and handle financial transactions. This connector provides
access to customers for payment analytics and customer management.
supported_questions:
- List customers created in the last 7 days
- Show me details for a recent customer
- List recent charges
- Show me details for a recent charge
- List recent invoices
- List active subscriptions
- Create a payment intent for $50.00 USD
- Create a new invoice for customer cus_123
- Create a subscription for customer cus_123 with price price_456
- Create a price of $29.99/month for product prod_789
- Create a checkout session for price price_456
- Cancel payment intent pi_123
- Finalize invoice inv_123
- Show me my top 10 customers by total revenue this month
- List all customers who have spent over $5,000 in the last quarter
- Analyze payment trends for my Stripe customers
- Identify which customers have the most consistent subscription payments
- Give me insights into my customer retention rates
- Summarize the payment history for {customer}
- Compare customer spending patterns from last month to this month
- Show me details about my highest-value Stripe customers
- What are the key financial insights from my customer base?
- Break down my customers by their average transaction value

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: A limit on the number of objects to be returned. Limit can range between 1 and 100, and the default is 10.

parameters.name: starting_after
parameters.description: A cursor for use in pagination. starting_after is an object ID that defines your place in the list. For instance, if you make a list request and receive 100 objects, ending with obj_foo, your subsequent call can include starting_after=obj_foo in order to fetch the next page of the list.

parameters.name: ending_before
parameters.description: A cursor for use in pagination. ending_before is an object ID that defines your place in the list. For instance, if you make a list request and receive 100 objects, starting with obj_bar, your subsequent call can include ending_before=obj_bar in order to fetch the previous page of the list.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: A case-sensitive filter on the list based on the customer's email field. The value must be a string.

parameters.name: created
parameters.description: Only return customers that were created during the given date interval.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The status of the subscriptions to retrieve. Passing in a value of canceled will return all canceled subscriptions, including those belonging to deleted customers. Pass ended to find subscriptions that are canceled and subscriptions that are expired due to incomplete payment. Passing in a value of all will return subscriptions of all statuses. If no value is supplied, all subscriptions that have not been canceled are returned.

subscriptions.description: By default, returns a list of subscriptions that have not been canceled
Creates a new subscription on an existing customer. Each customer can have up to 500 active or scheduled subscriptions.

parameters.name: id

subscriptions.description: Updates an existing subscription on a customer to match the specified parameters. When changing prices or quantities, we optionally prorate the price we charge next month to make up for any price changes.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The subscription ID

subscriptions.description: Cancels a customer's subscription immediately. The customer will not be charged again for the subscription. Any pending invoice items that you've created will still be charged for at the end of the period, unless manually deleted.

refunds.description: Returns a list of all refunds you've previously created. The refunds are returned in sorted order, with the most recent refunds appearing first.

When you create a new refund, you must specify a Charge or a PaymentIntent object on which to create it. Creating a new refund will refund a charge that has previously been created but not yet refunded.

payment_intent_confirmations.description: Confirm that your customer intends to pay with current or provided payment method. Upon confirmation, the PaymentIntent will attempt to initiate a payment.

parameters.description: The ID of the payment intent to cancel

payment_intent_cancellations.description: You can cancel a PaymentIntent object when it's in one of these statuses - requires_payment_method, requires_capture, requires_confirmation, requires_action, or processing.

prices.description: Creates a new price for an existing product. The price can be recurring for use in subscriptions or one-time for use in one-off charges.

checkout_sessions.description: Creates a Checkout Session object. You can use it to create a payment page hosted on Stripe that customers can use to complete their purchase.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the payment method to attach

payment_method_attachments.description: Attaches a PaymentMethod object to a Customer. To use this PaymentMethod as the default for invoice or subscription payments, set invoice_settings.default_payment_method on the Customer.

payouts.description: Returns a list of existing payouts sent to third-party bank accounts or payouts that Stripe sent to you. The payouts return in sorted order, with the most recently created payouts appearing first.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the payout

payouts.description: Retrieves the details of an existing payout. Supply the unique payout ID from either a payout creation request or the payout list, and Stripe will return the corresponding payout information.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Amount intended to be collected by this payment in the smallest currency unit (e.g., 100 cents for $1.00), supporting up to eight digits.

fields.name: amount_captured
fields.description: Amount that was actually captured from this charge.

fields.name: amount_refunded
fields.description: Amount that has been refunded back to the customer.

fields.name: amount_updates
fields.description: Updates to the amount that have been made during the charge lifecycle.

fields.name: application
fields.description: ID of the application that created this charge (Connect only).

fields.name: application_fee
fields.description: ID of the application fee associated with this charge (Connect only).

fields.name: application_fee_amount
fields.description: The amount of the application fee deducted from this charge (Connect only).

fields.name: balance_transaction
fields.description: ID of the balance transaction that describes the impact of this charge on your account balance (excluding refunds or disputes).

fields.name: billing_details
fields.description: Billing information associated with the payment method at the time of the transaction, including name, email, phone, and address.

fields.name: calculated_statement_descriptor
fields.description: The full statement descriptor that appears on the customer's credit card statement, combining prefix and suffix.

fields.name: captured
fields.description: Whether the charge has been captured and funds transferred to your account.

fields.name: card
fields.description: Deprecated card object containing payment card details if a card was used.

fields.name: created
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the charge was created.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Three-letter ISO currency code in lowercase (e.g., 'usd', 'eur') for the charge amount.

fields.name: customer
fields.description: ID of the customer this charge is for, if one exists.

fields.name: description
fields.description: An arbitrary string attached to the charge, often useful for displaying to users or internal reference.

fields.name: destination
fields.description: ID of the destination account where funds are transferred (Connect only).

fields.name: dispute
fields.description: ID of the dispute object if the charge has been disputed.

fields.name: disputed
fields.description: Whether the charge has been disputed by the customer with their card issuer.

fields.name: failure_balance_transaction
fields.description: ID of the balance transaction that describes the reversal of funds if the charge failed.

fields.name: failure_code
fields.description: Error code explaining the reason for charge failure, if applicable.

fields.name: failure_message
fields.description: Human-readable message providing more details about why the charge failed.

fields.name: fraud_details
fields.description: Information about fraud assessments and user reports related to this charge.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the charge, used to link transactions across other records.

fields.name: invoice
fields.description: ID of the invoice this charge is for, if the charge was created by invoicing.

fields.name: livemode
fields.description: Whether the charge occurred in live mode (true) or test mode (false).

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Key-value pairs for storing additional structured information about the charge, useful for internal tracking.

fields.name: object
fields.description: String representing the object type, always 'charge' for charge objects.

fields.name: on_behalf_of
fields.description: ID of the account on whose behalf the charge was made (Connect only).

fields.name: order
fields.description: Deprecated field for order information associated with this charge.

fields.name: outcome
fields.description: Details about the outcome of the charge, including network status, risk assessment, and reason codes.

fields.name: paid
fields.description: Whether the charge succeeded and funds were successfully collected.

fields.name: payment_intent
fields.description: ID of the PaymentIntent associated with this charge, if one exists.

fields.name: payment_method
fields.description: ID of the payment method used for this charge.

fields.name: payment_method_details
fields.description: Details about the payment method at the time of the transaction, including card brand, network, and authentication results.

fields.name: receipt_email
fields.description: Email address to which the receipt for this charge was sent.

fields.name: receipt_number
fields.description: Receipt number that appears on email receipts sent for this charge.

fields.name: receipt_url
fields.description: URL to a hosted receipt page for this charge, viewable by the customer.

fields.name: refunded
fields.description: Whether the charge has been fully refunded (partial refunds will still show as false).

fields.name: refunds
fields.description: List of refunds that have been applied to this charge.

fields.name: review
fields.description: ID of the review object associated with this charge, if it was flagged for manual review.

fields.name: shipping
fields.description: Shipping information for the charge, including recipient name, address, and tracking details.

fields.name: source
fields.description: Deprecated payment source object used to create this charge.

fields.name: source_transfer
fields.description: ID of the transfer from a source account if funds came from another Stripe account (Connect only).

fields.name: statement_description
fields.description: Deprecated alias for statement_descriptor.

fields.name: statement_descriptor
fields.description: Statement descriptor that overrides the account default for card charges, appearing on the customer's statement.

fields.name: statement_descriptor_suffix
fields.description: Suffix concatenated to the account's statement descriptor prefix to form the complete descriptor on customer statements.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current status of the payment: 'succeeded' (completed), 'pending' (processing), or 'failed' (unsuccessful).

fields.name: transfer_data
fields.description: Object containing destination and amount for transfers to connected accounts (Connect only).

fields.name: transfer_group
fields.description: String identifier for grouping related charges and transfers together (Connect only).

fields.name: updated
fields.description: Timestamp of the last update to this charge object.

fields.name: account_balance
fields.description: Current balance value representing funds owed by or to the customer.

fields.name: address
fields.description: The customer's address information including line1, line2, city, state, postal code, and country.

fields.name: balance
fields.description: Current balance (positive or negative) that is automatically applied to the customer's next invoice.

fields.name: cards
fields.description: Card payment methods associated with the customer account.

fields.name: created
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the customer object was created.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Three-letter ISO currency code representing the customer's default currency.

fields.name: default_card
fields.description: The default card to be used for charges when no specific payment method is provided.

fields.name: default_source
fields.description: The default payment source (card or bank account) for the customer.

fields.name: delinquent
fields.description: Boolean indicating whether the customer is currently delinquent on payments.

fields.name: description
fields.description: An arbitrary string attached to the customer, often useful for displaying to users.

fields.name: discount
fields.description: Discount object describing any active discount applied to the customer.

fields.name: email
fields.description: The customer's email address for communication and tracking purposes.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the customer object.

fields.name: invoice_prefix
fields.description: The prefix for invoice numbers generated for this customer.

fields.name: invoice_settings
fields.description: Customer's invoice-related settings including default payment method and custom fields.

fields.name: is_deleted
fields.description: Boolean indicating whether the customer has been deleted.

fields.name: livemode
fields.description: Boolean indicating whether the object exists in live mode or test mode.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Set of key-value pairs for storing additional structured information about the customer.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The customer's full name or business name.

fields.name: next_invoice_sequence
fields.description: The sequence number for the next invoice generated for this customer.

fields.name: object
fields.description: String representing the object type, always 'customer'.

fields.name: phone
fields.description: The customer's phone number.

fields.name: preferred_locales
fields.description: Array of preferred locales for the customer, used for invoice and receipt localization.

fields.name: shipping
fields.description: Mailing and shipping address for the customer, appears on invoices emailed to the customer.

fields.name: sources
fields.description: Payment sources (cards, bank accounts) attached to the customer for making payments.

fields.name: subscriptions
fields.description: List of active subscriptions associated with the customer.

fields.name: tax_exempt
fields.description: Describes the customer's tax exemption status (none, exempt, or reverse).

fields.name: tax_info
fields.description: Tax identification information for the customer.

fields.name: tax_info_verification
fields.description: Verification status of the customer's tax information.

fields.name: test_clock
fields.description: ID of the test clock associated with this customer for testing time-dependent scenarios.

fields.name: updated
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the customer object was last updated.

fields.name: account_country
fields.description: The country of the business associated with this invoice, commonly used to display localized content.

fields.name: account_name
fields.description: The public name of the business associated with this invoice.

fields.name: account_tax_ids
fields.description: Tax IDs of the account associated with this invoice.

fields.name: amount_due
fields.description: Total amount, in smallest currency unit, that is due and owed by the customer.

fields.name: amount_paid
fields.description: Total amount, in smallest currency unit, that has been paid by the customer.

fields.name: amount_remaining
fields.description: The difference between amount_due and amount_paid, representing the outstanding balance.

fields.name: amount_shipping
fields.description: Total amount of shipping costs on the invoice.

fields.name: application
fields.description: ID of the Connect application that created this invoice.

fields.name: application_fee
fields.description: Amount of application fee charged for this invoice in a Connect scenario.

fields.name: application_fee_amount
fields.description: The fee in smallest currency unit that is collected by the application in a Connect scenario.

fields.name: attempt_count
fields.description: Number of payment attempts made for this invoice.

fields.name: attempted
fields.description: Whether an attempt has been made to pay the invoice.

fields.name: auto_advance
fields.description: Controls whether Stripe performs automatic collection of the invoice.

fields.name: automatic_tax
fields.description: Settings and status for automatic tax calculation on this invoice.

fields.name: billing
fields.description: Billing method used for the invoice (charge_automatically or send_invoice).

fields.name: billing_reason
fields.description: Indicates the reason why the invoice was created (subscription_cycle, manual, etc.).

fields.name: charge
fields.description: ID of the latest charge generated for this invoice, if any.

fields.name: closed
fields.description: Whether the invoice has been marked as closed and no longer open for collection.

fields.name: collection_method
fields.description: Method by which the invoice is collected: charge_automatically or send_invoice.

fields.name: created
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the invoice was created.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Three-letter ISO currency code in which the invoice is denominated.

fields.name: custom_fields
fields.description: Custom fields displayed on the invoice as specified by the account.

fields.name: customer
fields.description: The customer object or ID associated with this invoice.

fields.name: customer_address
fields.description: The customer's address at the time the invoice was finalized.

fields.name: customer_email
fields.description: The customer's email address at the time the invoice was finalized.

fields.name: customer_name
fields.description: The customer's name at the time the invoice was finalized.

fields.name: customer_phone
fields.description: The customer's phone number at the time the invoice was finalized.

fields.name: customer_shipping
fields.description: The customer's shipping information at the time the invoice was finalized.

fields.name: customer_tax_exempt
fields.description: The customer's tax exempt status at the time the invoice was finalized.

fields.name: customer_tax_ids
fields.description: The customer's tax IDs at the time the invoice was finalized.

fields.name: default_payment_method
fields.description: Default payment method for the invoice, used if no other method is specified.

fields.name: default_source
fields.description: Default payment source for the invoice if no payment method is set.

fields.name: default_tax_rates
fields.description: The tax rates applied to the invoice by default.

fields.name: description
fields.description: An arbitrary string attached to the invoice, often displayed to customers.

fields.name: discount
fields.description: The discount object applied to the invoice, if any.

fields.name: discounts
fields.description: Array of discount IDs or objects currently applied to this invoice.

fields.name: due_date
fields.description: The date by which payment on this invoice is due, if the invoice is not auto-collected.

fields.name: effective_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the invoice becomes effective and finalized for payment.

fields.name: ending_balance
fields.description: The customer's ending account balance after this invoice is finalized.

fields.name: footer
fields.description: Footer text displayed on the invoice.

fields.name: forgiven
fields.description: Whether the invoice has been forgiven and is considered paid without actual payment.

fields.name: from_invoice
fields.description: Details about the invoice this invoice was created from, if applicable.

fields.name: hosted_invoice_url
fields.description: URL for the hosted invoice page where customers can view and pay the invoice.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the invoice object.

fields.name: invoice_pdf
fields.description: URL for the PDF version of the invoice.

fields.name: is_deleted
fields.description: Indicates whether this invoice has been deleted.

fields.name: issuer
fields.description: Details about the entity issuing the invoice.

fields.name: last_finalization_error
fields.description: The error encountered during the last finalization attempt, if any.

fields.name: latest_revision
fields.description: The latest revision of the invoice, if revisions are enabled.

fields.name: lines
fields.description: The individual line items that make up the invoice, representing products, services, or fees.

fields.name: livemode
fields.description: Indicates whether the invoice exists in live mode (true) or test mode (false).

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Key-value pairs for storing additional structured information about the invoice.

fields.name: next_payment_attempt
fields.description: Timestamp of the next automatic payment attempt for this invoice, if applicable.

fields.name: number
fields.description: A unique, human-readable identifier for this invoice, often shown to customers.

fields.name: object
fields.description: String representing the object type, always 'invoice'.

fields.name: on_behalf_of
fields.description: The account on behalf of which the invoice is being created, used in Connect scenarios.

fields.name: paid
fields.description: Whether the invoice has been paid in full.

fields.name: paid_out_of_band
fields.description: Whether payment was made outside of Stripe and manually marked as paid.

fields.name: payment
fields.description: ID of the payment associated with this invoice, if any.

fields.name: payment_intent
fields.description: The PaymentIntent associated with this invoice for processing payment.

fields.name: payment_settings
fields.description: Configuration settings for how payment should be collected on this invoice.

fields.name: period_end
fields.description: End date of the billing period covered by this invoice.

fields.name: period_start
fields.description: Start date of the billing period covered by this invoice.

fields.name: post_payment_credit_notes_amount
fields.description: Total amount of credit notes issued after the invoice was paid.

fields.name: pre_payment_credit_notes_amount
fields.description: Total amount of credit notes applied before payment was attempted.

fields.name: quote
fields.description: The quote from which this invoice was generated, if applicable.

fields.name: receipt_number
fields.description: The receipt number displayed on the invoice, if available.

fields.name: rendering
fields.description: Settings that control how the invoice is rendered for display.

fields.name: rendering_options
fields.description: Options for customizing the visual rendering of the invoice.

fields.name: shipping_cost
fields.description: Total cost of shipping charges included in the invoice.

fields.name: shipping_details
fields.description: Detailed shipping information for the invoice, including address and carrier.

fields.name: starting_balance
fields.description: The customer's starting account balance at the beginning of the billing period.

fields.name: statement_description
fields.description: Extra information about the invoice that appears on the customer's credit card statement.

fields.name: statement_descriptor
fields.description: A dynamic descriptor that appears on the customer's credit card statement for this invoice.

fields.name: status
fields.description: The status of the invoice: draft, open, paid, void, or uncollectible.

fields.name: status_transitions
fields.description: Timestamps tracking when the invoice transitioned between different statuses.

fields.name: subscription
fields.description: The subscription this invoice was generated for, if applicable.

fields.name: subscription_details
fields.description: Additional details about the subscription associated with this invoice.

fields.name: subtotal
fields.description: Total of all line items before discounts or tax are applied.

fields.name: subtotal_excluding_tax
fields.description: The subtotal amount excluding any tax calculations.

fields.name: tax
fields.description: Total tax amount applied to the invoice.

fields.name: tax_percent
fields.description: The percentage of tax applied to the invoice (deprecated, use total_tax_amounts instead).

fields.name: test_clock
fields.description: ID of the test clock this invoice belongs to, used for testing time-dependent billing.

fields.name: total
fields.description: Total amount of the invoice after all line items, discounts, and taxes are calculated.

fields.name: total_discount_amounts
fields.description: Array of the total discount amounts applied, broken down by discount.

fields.name: total_excluding_tax
fields.description: Total amount of the invoice excluding all tax calculations.

fields.name: total_tax_amounts
fields.description: Array of tax amounts applied to the invoice, broken down by tax rate.

fields.name: transfer_data
fields.description: Information about the transfer of funds associated with this invoice in Connect scenarios.

fields.name: updated
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the invoice was last updated.

fields.name: webhooks_delivered_at
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when webhooks for this invoice were successfully delivered.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Amount refunded, in cents (the smallest currency unit).

fields.name: balance_transaction
fields.description: ID of the balance transaction that describes the impact of this refund on your account balance.

fields.name: charge
fields.description: ID of the charge that was refunded.

fields.name: created
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the refund was created.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Three-letter ISO currency code in lowercase representing the currency of the refund.

fields.name: destination_details
fields.description: Details about the destination where the refunded funds should be sent.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the refund object.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Set of key-value pairs that you can attach to an object for storing additional structured information.

fields.name: object
fields.description: String representing the object type, always 'refund'.

fields.name: payment_intent
fields.description: ID of the PaymentIntent that was refunded.

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Reason for the refund, either user-provided (duplicate, fraudulent, or requested_by_customer) or generated by Stripe internally (expired_uncaptured_charge).

fields.name: receipt_number
fields.description: The transaction number that appears on email receipts sent for this refund.

fields.name: source_transfer_reversal
fields.description: ID of the transfer reversal that was created as a result of refunding a transfer (Connect only).

fields.name: status
fields.description: Status of the refund (pending, requires_action, succeeded, failed, or canceled).

fields.name: transfer_reversal
fields.description: ID of the reversal of the transfer that funded the charge being refunded (Connect only).

fields.name: updated
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the refund was last updated.

fields.name: application
fields.description: For Connect platforms, the application associated with the subscription.

fields.name: application_fee_percent
fields.description: For Connect platforms, the percentage of the subscription amount taken as an application fee.

fields.name: automatic_tax
fields.description: Automatic tax calculation settings for the subscription.

fields.name: billing
fields.description: Billing mode configuration for the subscription.

fields.name: billing_cycle_anchor
fields.description: Timestamp determining when the billing cycle for the subscription starts.

fields.name: billing_cycle_anchor_config
fields.description: Configuration for the subscription's billing cycle anchor behavior.

fields.name: billing_thresholds
fields.description: Defines thresholds at which an invoice will be sent, controlling billing timing based on usage.

fields.name: cancel_at
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the subscription is scheduled to be canceled.

fields.name: cancel_at_period_end
fields.description: Boolean indicating whether the subscription will be canceled at the end of the current billing period.

fields.name: canceled_at
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the subscription was canceled, if applicable.

fields.name: cancellation_details
fields.description: Details about why and how the subscription was canceled.

fields.name: collection_method
fields.description: How invoices are collected (charge_automatically or send_invoice).

fields.name: created
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the subscription was created.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Three-letter ISO currency code in lowercase indicating the currency for the subscription.

fields.name: current_period_end
fields.description: Timestamp marking the end of the current billing period.

fields.name: current_period_start
fields.description: Timestamp marking the start of the current billing period.

fields.name: customer
fields.description: ID of the customer who owns the subscription, expandable to full customer object.

fields.name: days_until_due
fields.description: Number of days until the invoice is due for subscriptions using send_invoice collection method.

fields.name: default_payment_method
fields.description: ID of the default payment method for the subscription, taking precedence over default_source.

fields.name: default_source
fields.description: ID of the default payment source for the subscription.

fields.name: default_tax_rates
fields.description: Tax rates that apply to the subscription by default.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description of the subscription, displayable to the customer.

fields.name: discount
fields.description: Describes any discount currently applied to the subscription.

fields.name: ended_at
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the subscription ended, if applicable.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the subscription object.

fields.name: invoice_settings
fields.description: Settings for invoices generated by this subscription, such as custom fields and footer.

fields.name: is_deleted
fields.description: Indicates whether the subscription has been deleted.

fields.name: items
fields.description: List of subscription items, each with an attached price defining what the customer is subscribed to.

fields.name: latest_invoice
fields.description: The most recent invoice this subscription has generated, expandable to full invoice object.

fields.name: livemode
fields.description: Indicates whether the subscription exists in live mode (true) or test mode (false).

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Set of key-value pairs that you can attach to the subscription for storing additional structured information.

fields.name: next_pending_invoice_item_invoice
fields.description: Timestamp when the next invoice for pending invoice items will be created.

fields.name: object
fields.description: String representing the object type, always 'subscription'.

fields.name: on_behalf_of
fields.description: For Connect platforms, the account for which the subscription is being created or managed.

fields.name: pause_collection
fields.description: Configuration for pausing collection on the subscription while retaining the subscription structure.

fields.name: payment_settings
fields.description: Payment settings for invoices generated by this subscription.

fields.name: pending_invoice_item_interval
fields.description: Specifies an interval for aggregating usage records into pending invoice items.

fields.name: pending_setup_intent
fields.description: SetupIntent used for collecting user authentication when updating payment methods without immediate payment.

fields.name: pending_update
fields.description: If specified, pending updates that will be applied to the subscription once the latest_invoice has been paid.

fields.name: plan
fields.description: The plan associated with the subscription (deprecated, use items instead).

fields.name: quantity
fields.description: Quantity of the plan subscribed to (deprecated, use items instead).

fields.name: schedule
fields.description: ID of the subscription schedule managing this subscription's lifecycle, if applicable.

fields.name: start_date
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the subscription started.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current status of the subscription (incomplete, incomplete_expired, trialing, active, past_due, canceled, unpaid, or paused).

fields.name: tax_percent
fields.description: The percentage of tax applied to the subscription (deprecated, use default_tax_rates instead).

fields.name: test_clock
fields.description: ID of the test clock associated with this subscription for simulating time-based scenarios.

fields.name: transfer_data
fields.description: For Connect platforms, the account receiving funds from the subscription and optional percentage transferred.

fields.name: trial_end
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the trial period ends, if applicable.

fields.name: trial_settings
fields.description: Settings related to trial periods, including conditions for ending trials.

fields.name: trial_start
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the trial period began, if applicable.

fields.name: updated
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the subscription was last updated.
